data.title: Alphabet Shares Are Rising Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) shares are trading higher Tuesday following Google's unveiling of a new quantum computing chip with breakthrough capabilities. Here's what you need to know.

UnitedHealthcare CEO Murder Suspect: Chronic Pain, Unabomber Fascination, Isolation Details Emerge
data.description: Luigi Mangione charged with the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson. Family and friends say he was distant and had back pain. Manifesto suggests anger towards healthcare companies.

data.title: Duolingo And Netflix Bring Squid Game Fans Closer To Korean with New Language Challenge
data.description: Duolingo partners with Netflix's Squid Game for a fun "Learn Korean or Else" campaign, encouraging fans to embrace the language before Season 2.
